name: NextClaw App Runtime
summary: Create, inspect, publish, install, run, and share NextClaw Apps through the local napp CLI with official registry workflows, platform-login publish identity, and explicit permission mapping.

summaryI18n.en: Create, inspect, publish, install, run, and share NextClaw Apps through the local napp CLI with official registry workflows, platform-login publish identity, and explicit permission mapping.
summaryI18n.zh: 通过本地 napp CLI 创建、检查、发布、安装、运行和分享 NextClaw Apps，覆盖官方 registry 工作流、平台登录态发布身份与显式权限映射。

description: Use this skill when the user wants to build, publish, install, or use a local NextClaw App through the standalone @nextclaw/app-runtime package. The skill covers npm installation, napp readiness checks, `napp create` starter scaffolding, inspect-before-run workflow, `napp publish`, platform-login-based personal publish, official-scope admin publish, registry install flows, explicit document permission mapping, and first-run troubleshooting.

descriptionI18n.en: Use this skill when the user wants to build, publish, install, or use a local NextClaw App through the standalone @nextclaw/app-runtime package. The skill covers npm installation, napp readiness checks, `napp create` starter scaffolding, inspect-before-run workflow, `napp publish`, platform-login-based personal publish, official-scope admin publish, registry install flows, explicit document permission mapping, and first-run troubleshooting.
descriptionI18n.zh: 当用户希望通过独立的 @nextclaw/app-runtime 包来构建、发布、安装或使用本地 NextClaw App 时使用此技能。它覆盖 npm 安装、napp 就绪检查、`napp create` 起步脚手架、先 inspect 后 run 的工作流、`napp publish`、基于平台登录态的个人发布、官方 scope 管理员发布、官方 registry 安装流程、显式文档权限映射以及首轮运行排障。

author: NextClaw
